name: anvil
description: Anvil — an autonomous, self-healing, self-learning coding harness.

scripts.smoke: pnpm build && tsc --noEmit -p smoke/tsconfig.json && tsx smoke/smoke.ts
scripts.smoke:live: pnpm build && tsc --noEmit -p smoke/tsconfig.json && tsx smoke/live.ts
scripts.smoke:build: pnpm build && tsc --noEmit -p smoke/tsconfig.json && tsx smoke/build.ts
